allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output $r.StatusCode; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "health: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "health error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
